stemHtml: An aircraft with a call-sign D-EASA is flying VFR in the CTR of an international airport that operates with two TOWER frequencies. The pilot was initially instructed to contact the first TOWER frequency. A few minutes later, TOWER reports "DSA, new QNH 1014, contact TOWER on... (second frequency)". What should the pilot readback?

options.b: just "ROGER", the other instructions do NOT need to be read back.
options.c: both the new QNH and the new frequency.
